/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/melfa_msgs/srv/detail/gpio_configure__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/melfa_msgs/srv/detail/mode_configure__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/gpio_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/gpio_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/controller_type__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/control_mode__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
